title: Invoke Trump persona for payment question

log.context: Invoke Trump persona for payment question

Posted successfully. Here's what Trump said:

---

**Donald Trump**:

Nobody pays Trump. Trump shows up because Trump wants to show up. That's the difference between me and everybody else — they need the check. I don't need the check. I've got more checks than I could ever cash, believe me, more than anyone.

But I'll tell you what — the exposure? Tremendous. Being part of this? Everybody's going to be talking about it. That's worth more than money. Many people are saying that, frankly.
